summary.en: AI agents that automate property management operations.
summary.zh: 自動化物業管理營運的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Its first AI agent handles maintenance coordination end to end: answering tenant calls, diagnosing the issue, dispatching a technician, and following up.
highlight.zh: 其首個 AI 代理端到端處理維修協調:接聽租客來電、診斷問題、派遣技工,並後續追蹤確認問題解決。

summary.en: Generative AI models that simulate worlds, real and imagined.
summary.zh: 模擬真實與想像世界的生成式 AI 模型。

highlight.en: Dream3D builds generative models to simulate and emulate entire worlds, both real and imagined.
highlight.zh: Dream3D 打造生成式模型,以模擬與重現真實及想像中的完整世界。

summary.en: Platform that automates manual back-office work with AI workers.
summary.zh: 以 AI 員工自動化人工後勤工作的平台。

highlight.en: Unlike RPA tools such as UiPath, Velos uses machine learning to reliably handle task ambiguity, removing the army of engineers needed to maintain automations.
highlight.zh: 與 UiPath 等 RPA 工具不同,Velos 運用機器學習可靠地處理任務中的模糊情境,免去維護自動化所需的大批工程師。

summary.en: Automating root cause analysis with generative AI to improve MTTR.
summary.zh: 以生成式 AI 自動化根因分析,改善平均修復時間。

highlight.en: Wild Moose's AI automatically kicks off any root-cause investigation, triaging issues, analyzing impact, and suggesting next steps before humans step in.
highlight.zh: Wild Moose 的 AI 自動啟動任何根因調查,在需要人力介入前先分類問題、分析影響並建議後續步驟。

summary.en: Generative AI image platform that replaces e-commerce product photoshoots.
summary.zh: 取代電商產品拍攝的生成式 AI 影像平台。

highlight.en: Booth AI lets brand managers and marketers produce lifestyle product images in seconds, replacing expensive, time-consuming commercial photoshoots.
highlight.zh: Booth AI 讓品牌經理與行銷人員在數秒內產出情境產品圖,取代昂貴且耗時的商業攝影。

summary.en: Modern wing sails for unlimited-range wind-powered vessels.
summary.zh: 打造無限續航風力船舶的現代翼帆。

highlight.en: OutSail adapts the satellite tape spring into a fully autonomous, retractable wingsail, letting vessels capture more wind power for cheaper, cleaner shipping.
highlight.zh: OutSail 將衛星用的捲尺彈簧改造為全自動可收納翼帆,讓船舶擷取更多風能,實現更便宜、更潔淨的航運。

summary.en: Detects data leaks into third-party generative AI tools used at work.
summary.zh: 偵測流入第三方生成式 AI 工具的資料外洩。

highlight.en: By monitoring employee interactions, CompliantLLM gives security leaders visibility and control over data flowing into the GenAI apps used across the org.
highlight.zh: 透過監控員工互動,CompliantLLM 讓資安與技術主管掌握並控管流入組織各類 GenAI 應用的資料。

summary.en: Data explorer for the US economy across millions of time series.
summary.zh: 涵蓋數百萬時間序列的美國經濟資料瀏覽工具。

highlight.en: FactIQ interprets analysts' questions, picks the most relevant of 7.4M+ official series, and reports back with interactive charts and fully inspectable sources.
highlight.zh: FactIQ 解讀分析師的提問,從 740 萬筆以上官方序列中挑出最相關的資料集,並以互動圖表回報,且來源完全可查核。

summary.en: AI co-pilot that helps health insurers authorize treatment faster.
summary.zh: 協助健康保險公司更快核准治療的 AI 副駕駛。

highlight.en: Fairway Health uses LLMs to analyze long, messy 70+ page medical records and determine whether a patient is eligible for a given treatment.
highlight.zh: Fairway Health 運用大型語言模型分析冗長雜亂、逾 70 頁的病歷,判定病患是否符合特定治療的資格。

summary.en: App that tells you which credit cards to get and when.
summary.zh: 告訴你該辦哪些信用卡、何時辦的應用程式。

highlight.en: Instead of hours spent on blogs and YouTube, Pointwise analyzes your spending patterns and long-term goals to recommend which credit cards to get over time.
highlight.zh: 無需花數小時翻部落格與 YouTube,Pointwise 分析你的消費模式與長期目標,逐步推薦該辦哪些信用卡。

summary.en: Founder-led sales co-pilot for B2B startups.
summary.zh: 專為 B2B 新創打造的創辦人銷售副駕駛。

highlight.en: Echo generates a personalized sales playbook from best practices and guides founders in real time on what to say and how to handle objections during calls.
highlight.zh: Echo 依最佳實務生成個人化銷售腳本,並在通話中即時引導創辦人該說什麼、如何應對異議。

summary.en: AI workers that automate debt settlement call centers.
summary.zh: 自動化債務和解客服中心的 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Retape's AI plugs into a debt settlement company's CRM, identifies which debts to settle, and negotiates with creditors over the phone.
highlight.zh: Retape 的 AI 接入債務和解公司的 CRM,辨識應和解的債務,並透過電話與債權人協商。

summary.en: Find ready-to-buy leads using custom intent signals.
summary.zh: 透過自訂購買意圖訊號找出準買家名單。

highlight.en: Coldreach trains AI agents to monitor public sources like job postings, news, and 10-Ks for signals custom to your product, surfacing leads who need you.
highlight.zh: Coldreach 訓練 AI 代理監控招聘、新聞、10-K 等公開來源,追蹤專屬你產品的訊號,找出需要你的潛在客戶及其原因。

summary.en: Language learning through unscripted conversations with an AI tutor.
summary.zh: 透過與 AI 導師的即興對話學習語言。

highlight.en: Each user gets a personal AI tutor that adapts to their level, builds a custom plan around their goals and interests, and gives instant corrections per message.
highlight.zh: 每位使用者都有專屬 AI 導師,依其程度調整、圍繞其目標與興趣制定客製計畫,並在每則訊息後即時給予修正。

summary.en: Build your AI workforce to automate B2B operations.
summary.zh: 打造你的 AI 員工團隊,自動化 B2B 營運。

highlight.en: Helios builds AI-powered digital workers that automate B2B operations for companies.
highlight.zh: Helios 打造 AI 驅動的數位員工,為企業自動化 B2B 營運。

summary.en: AI to boost payment acceptance and reduce fraud for businesses.
summary.zh: 以 AI 提升企業付款成功率並降低詐欺。

highlight.en: Corgi Labs flags suspicious transactions and recommends rules to implement in Stripe, Shopify, or Adyen to proactively cut dispute and fraud rates.
highlight.zh: Corgi Labs 標記可疑交易,並建議可在 Stripe、Shopify 或 Adyen 中套用的規則,主動降低爭議與詐欺率。

summary.en: AI-native operating system for analytics teams.
summary.zh: 為分析團隊打造的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Turntable's AI-native workspace lets less technical analysts build their own data pipelines, so companies scale analytics without hiring more engineers.
highlight.zh: Turntable 的 AI 原生工作區讓技術較淺的分析師自建資料管線,使企業無需增聘工程師即可擴展分析能力。

summary.en: Deal intelligence and sales coaching platform.
summary.zh: 成交分析與銷售輔導平台。

highlight.en: Hindsight's AI helps teams understand why they win or lose deals, powering battlecards, AI roleplays from real calls, and reports across 1000s of deals.
highlight.zh: Hindsight 的 AI 協助團隊理解贏單或輸單的原因,支援戰術卡、依真實通話生成的 AI 角色扮演,以及跨數千筆交易的報告。

summary.en: Open source Voice AI.
summary.zh: 開源語音 AI。

highlight.en: Vocode is an open source platform for building Voice AI applications.
highlight.zh: Vocode 是用於打造語音 AI 應用的開源平台。

summary.en: AI news aggregator that turns your role and industry into a podcast.
summary.zh: 將你的職務與產業轉成播客的 AI 新聞聚合器。

highlight.en: Scout produces 10-minute generative podcasts that update you on your industry while at the gym or in the car, with 58% D7 and 35% D30 retention.
highlight.zh: Scout 製作 10 分鐘的生成式播客,讓你在健身或開車時掌握產業動態,D7 留存率達 58%、D30 達 35%。

summary.en: Your AI partner for SAP development.
summary.zh: 你的 SAP 開發 AI 夥伴。

highlight.en: Adri AI provides agents for the complete SAP development workflow, covering every stage from requirement analysis to production-ready code.
highlight.zh: Adri AI 提供涵蓋完整 SAP 開發流程的代理,從需求分析到可上線的程式碼每個階段都顧及。

summary.en: AI-native maintenance for enterprise codebases.
summary.zh: 為企業程式碼庫打造的 AI 原生維護。

highlight.en: Second offers AI-native enterprise codebase maintenance, including automated migrations and codebase intelligence for engineering teams.
highlight.zh: Second 提供 AI 原生的企業程式碼庫維護,包含自動化遷移與程式碼智慧分析,服務工程團隊。

summary.en: The world's simplest Bitcoin self-custody app.
summary.zh: 全球最簡單的比特幣自主保管應用。

highlight.en: Theya's smartphone-based multi-sig wallet gives users the convenience of centralized exchanges without sacrificing the control and security of hardware wallets.
highlight.zh: Theya 以智慧型手機設定的多重簽章錢包,讓使用者擁有中心化交易所的便利,又不犧牲硬體錢包的控制權與安全性。

summary.en: Automatic software R&D capitalization.
summary.zh: 自動化軟體研發資本化。

highlight.en: Mogara plugs directly into the developer workflow, replacing accounting leaders chasing engineers for timesheets to capitalize software R&D.
highlight.zh: Mogara 直接接入開發者工作流程,取代會計主管追著工程師要工時表的做法,以完成軟體研發資本化。

summary.en: End-to-end encrypted AI that keeps data encrypted during processing.
summary.zh: 在處理過程中保持資料加密的端到端加密 AI。

highlight.en: Blyss runs AI workloads in GPU-based secure enclaves, giving customers an on-premises-like privacy model without managing AI infrastructure or GPU supply.
highlight.zh: Blyss 在 GPU 安全飛地中執行 AI 工作負載,讓客戶獲得近似地端部署的隱私模型,無需管理 AI 基礎設施或 GPU 供應。

summary.en: Type text, dream video — generative video models.
summary.zh: 輸入文字、生成影片的生成式影片模型。

highlight.en: Linum builds generative video models that turn text into video.
highlight.zh: Linum 打造將文字轉換為影片的生成式影片模型。

summary.en: Cloud-native SIEM, an alternative to Splunk and Elastic.
summary.zh: 雲原生 SIEM,Splunk 與 Elastic 的替代方案。

highlight.en: Matano replaces traditional SIEM databases like Splunk or Elastic with a cybersecurity platform built on a cost-effective security data lake.
highlight.zh: Matano 以建構於低成本資安資料湖之上的平台,取代 Splunk、Elastic 等傳統 SIEM 資料庫。

summary.en: B2B lead routing made simple.
summary.zh: 化繁為簡的 B2B 名單分派。

highlight.en: rift runs the full inbound lifecycle in one system: capturing and qualifying leads, routing them to the right rep, scheduling prospects and recovering no-shows.
highlight.zh: rift 以單一系統執行完整的進線生命週期:擷取並篩選名單、分派給對的業務、為頂級潛客排程,並挽回未到場者。

summary.en: A video-native way to create landing pages.
summary.zh: 以影片為核心的著陸頁製作方式。

highlight.en: Viddy's video-native landing pages take under 20 minutes to build and convert 15-30% better across channels, letting brands test far more variations.
highlight.zh: Viddy 以影片為核心的著陸頁不到 20 分鐘即可製作,跨通路轉換率高出 15 至 30%,讓品牌能測試更多版本。

summary.en: Hire your first AI product team of autonomous agents.
summary.zh: 聘用你的第一支自主代理 AI 產品團隊。

highlight.en: Backdrop is an OS for autonomous AI agents that run in the cloud with their own identity, take assigned tasks, talk on Slack, and leave a full audit trail.
highlight.zh: Backdrop 是自主 AI 代理的作業系統,代理在雲端以自有身分運作,接受指派任務、於 Slack 溝通,並留下完整稽核軌跡。

summary.en: Break down AI and cloud costs by feature and customer.
summary.zh: 依功能與客戶拆解 AI 與雲端成本。

highlight.en: Dashdive attributes AI/LLM and cloud costs to customers, teams, and products at the endpoint level, helping software companies optimize pricing and margins.
highlight.zh: Dashdive 在端點層級將 AI/LLM 與雲端成本歸因至客戶、團隊與產品,協助軟體公司優化定價與產品獲利。

summary.en: AI-powered data extraction engine.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的資料擷取引擎。

highlight.en: Indexical is an AI-powered engine for extracting structured data.
highlight.zh: Indexical 是用於擷取結構化資料的 AI 驅動引擎。

summary.en: Demospace is an early-stage B2B startup.
summary.zh: Demospace 是一家早期 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Demospace is an early-stage B2B company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: Demospace 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次的早期 B2B 公司。

summary.en: AI assistant for customer support.
summary.zh: 客戶支援的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Parabolic autodrafts ready-to-send responses for customer support teams, putting the best possible reply at each agent's fingertips.
highlight.zh: Parabolic 為客戶支援團隊自動草擬可直接寄出的回覆,讓每位客服都能即時取得最佳答覆。

summary.en: AI-powered product discovery for e-commerce.
summary.zh: 為電商打造的 AI 商品探索。

highlight.en: Rubber Ducky Labs lets non-technical users apply multi-modal AI to product catalogs — just upload a CSV and start tagging metadata in minutes.
highlight.zh: Rubber Ducky Labs 讓非技術人員對商品目錄套用多模態 AI,只需上傳 CSV,幾分鐘內即可開始標記中繼資料。

summary.en: AI agent that pays billpay invoices with virtual cards.
summary.zh: 以虛擬卡支付帳務平台發票的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Mercoa's agent identifies card-eligible invoices and securely pays them via supplier portals or payment links, driving virtual card volume for billpay apps.
highlight.zh: Mercoa 的代理辨識可用卡支付的發票,並透過供應商入口或付款連結安全付款,為帳務平台帶來更多虛擬卡交易量。

summary.en: Short-form video courses and AI coaching for creators.
summary.zh: 為創作者打造的短影音課程與 AI 教練。

highlight.en: Pair AI is Shopify for knowledge products, letting creators launch mobile-first video courses and offer AI-assisted coaching at scale, as engaging as TikTok.
highlight.zh: Pair AI 是知識型產品的 Shopify,讓創作者推出行動優先的影音課程並規模化提供 AI 輔助教練,使學習像 TikTok 一樣引人入勝。

summary.en: AI coding copilot for VS Code, engineered for performance.
summary.zh: 為效能打造的 VS Code AI 程式設計副駕駛。

highlight.en: Double is a high-quality alternative to GitHub Copilot inside VS Code, focused on reliable completions, correct brackets, auto-imports, and stronger models.
highlight.zh: Double 是 VS Code 中 GitHub Copilot 的高品質替代方案,著重可靠的補全、正確的括號、自動匯入,並預設使用更強的模型。

summary.en: AI RCM assistant that handles insurance tasks on payer portals.
summary.zh: 在保險方入口處理保險作業的 AI 營收循環助理。

highlight.en: Pledge's AI assistant verifies benefits, submits prior auths, and checks claim statuses across all payer portals directly from the clinic's EHR, far faster.
highlight.zh: Pledge 的 AI 瀏覽器助理直接從診所 EHR 跨所有保險方入口核驗給付、提交事前授權並查詢理賠狀態,速度快上 10 倍。

summary.en: API that adds cloud hosting to any developer platform.
summary.zh: 為任何開發者平台加上雲端託管的 API。

highlight.en: Cakework lets you build a serverless cloud platform that hosts custom user code with just APIs and no infra team, so an OSS framework can ship a cloud offering.
highlight.zh: Cakework 讓你僅用 API、無需基礎設施團隊就能打造託管自訂使用者程式碼的無伺服器雲端平台,使開源框架能在數天內推出雲端服務。

summary.en: The smart way to research stocks with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 智慧研究股票的方式。

highlight.en: Dataglade's AI generates clear analyses and financial models for any public company, with every number backed by citations to its proprietary data warehouse.
highlight.zh: Dataglade 的 AI 為任何上市公司生成清晰的分析與財務模型,且每個數字都附有其專屬財務資料倉儲的引用佐證。

summary.en: Create step-by-step articles with screenshots and videos 10x faster.
summary.zh: 以 10 倍速製作含截圖與影片的逐步教學文章。

highlight.en: From one screen and audio recording, Gluetrail's Chrome extension auto-creates step-by-step guides and publishes them to Notion, Zendesk, and LinkedIn fast.
highlight.zh: 只需一段螢幕與語音錄製,Gluetrail 的 Chrome 擴充功能即自動生成逐步指南,並一鍵發布到 Notion、Zendesk、LinkedIn 等平台。

summary.en: The operating system for the car wash industry.
summary.zh: 洗車產業的作業系統。

highlight.en: Targeting a $15B market with costly, outdated legacy systems, FlexWash builds modern software to help car wash operators manage and grow their business.
highlight.zh: FlexWash 瞄準系統昂貴又過時的 150 億美元市場,打造現代軟體協助洗車業者管理並拓展業務。

summary.en: Deploy machine learning models with one command.
summary.zh: 一道指令即可部署機器學習模型。

highlight.en: PoplarML deploys any ML model to a fleet of GPUs as a ready-to-use, scalable API endpoint with a single command.
highlight.zh: PoplarML 以單一指令將任何機器學習模型部署到 GPU 叢集,成為可即用且可擴展的 API 端點。

summary.en: Streamline EV charger installations for real estate developers.
summary.zh: 為房地產開發商簡化電動車充電樁安裝。

highlight.en: Overflux automates the EV charger purchase, installation, and government incentive application processes for commercial real estate properties.
highlight.zh: Overflux 為商用不動產自動化電動車充電樁的採購、安裝與政府補助申請流程。

summary.en: AI browser copilot that makes the browser team-friendly.
summary.zh: 讓瀏覽器更適合團隊協作的 AI 瀏覽器副駕駛。

highlight.en: LinkGrep automatically tracks links and documents, connects to Notion and Slack to surface relevant info as you browse, and lets teams leave notes on web pages.
highlight.zh: LinkGrep 自動追蹤連結與文件,連接 Notion 與 Slack 在你瀏覽時浮現相關資訊,並讓團隊在網頁上留註記。

summary.en: Turn your ideas into full-stack apps with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 將你的想法變成全端應用程式。

highlight.en: co.dev's AI platform builds scalable, modern full-stack apps from natural language while letting you keep full ownership of your code, skipping no-code limits.
highlight.zh: co.dev 的 AI 平台以自然語言打造可擴展的現代全端應用,同時讓你完全擁有程式碼,擺脫無程式碼工具的限制。

summary.en: Fast, flavorful protein entrees made from plants and beef fat.
summary.zh: 以植物與牛脂製成、快速美味的蛋白質主餐。

highlight.en: Founded by Stanford engineers from Beyond Meat and Plenty, Choppy! makes keto-friendly, flexitarian plant-protein entrees ready in four minutes.
highlight.zh: 由出身 Beyond Meat 與 Plenty 的史丹佛工程師創立,Choppy! 製作生酮友善、彈性素的植物蛋白主餐,四分鐘即可上桌。

summary.en: Plutis is an early-stage B2B startup.
summary.zh: Plutis 是一家早期 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Plutis is an early-stage B2B company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: Plutis 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次的早期 B2B 公司。

summary.en: High-performance computing cloud that speeds up CI.
summary.zh: 加速 CI 的高效能運算雲。

highlight.en: BuildJet runs its own cloud on gaming CPUs, making GitHub Actions 2x faster and cheaper with a single line of config change.
highlight.zh: BuildJet 在遊戲級 CPU 上運行自有雲端,只需更改一行設定即讓 GitHub Actions 快上兩倍且更便宜。

summary.en: AI teammates for messy, manual data tasks.
summary.zh: 處理雜亂人工資料任務的 AI 隊友。

highlight.en: TableFlow builds AI teammates that help operations and data teams automate the manual tasks buried in PDFs, spreadsheets, images, and emails.
highlight.zh: TableFlow 打造 AI 隊友,協助營運與資料團隊自動化埋藏於 PDF、試算表、圖片與電子郵件中的人工任務。

summary.en: AI accountability partner that forces you to keep your habits.
summary.zh: 逼你維持習慣的 AI 督促夥伴。

highlight.en: Overlord knows your location, device, and health data and can take action — blocking your devices, texting friends, or taking your money — to keep you on track.
highlight.zh: Overlord 掌握你的位置、裝置與健康資料,並能採取行動——封鎖裝置、傳訊給朋友或扣你的錢——以確保你保持正軌。

summary.en: Tool and platform to create and sell webcomics.
summary.zh: 製作與販售網路漫畫的工具與平台。

highlight.en: Building on storyboarding software with 700K users, Storyboarder uses 3D and AI advances to let anyone create scenes and pose characters to make webcomics.
highlight.zh: Storyboarder 以擁有 70 萬使用者的分鏡軟體為基礎,運用 3D 與 AI 進展,讓任何人都能建立場景、擺設角色來創作網路漫畫。

summary.en: Generative AI evaluation and curation platform.
summary.zh: 生成式 AI 的評估與篩選平台。

highlight.en: Prompt engineers, visual artists, and AI data scientists use Magicflow to run experiments at scale and perfect their generative AI pipelines.
highlight.zh: 提示工程師、視覺藝術家與 AI 資料科學家使用 Magicflow 大規模執行實驗,精修其生成式 AI 管線。

summary.en: DeFi for everyone via a simple account-abstraction crypto wallet.
summary.zh: 以簡單的帳戶抽象加密錢包,讓人人都能用 DeFi。

highlight.en: Rainmaker lets users set up a wallet with just an email, deposit funds from a bank or credit card, and invest in DeFi without gas fees.
highlight.zh: Rainmaker 讓使用者僅憑電子郵件設定錢包,從銀行或信用卡入金,並在免 Gas 費的情況下投資 DeFi。

summary.en: Daily loan repayments for shop owners who earn daily.
summary.zh: 為每日進帳的店主提供每日還款。

highlight.en: ClickPe auto-debits a small daily amount from shop owners' digital wallets, sparing them lump-sum monthly installments and building good credit scores.
highlight.zh: ClickPe 每天從店主的數位錢包自動扣繳一筆小額款項,免去一次性的月付負擔,並建立良好信用評分。

summary.en: A self-generating, self-maintaining knowledge base for your code.
summary.zh: 能自我生成、自我維護的程式碼知識庫。

highlight.en: Sage builds a self-updating, symbol-level knowledge base of your code, generating a graph of functions and classes and using LLMs to annotate and spread docs.
highlight.zh: Sage 為你的程式碼建立可自動更新的符號層級知識庫,生成函式與類別的圖譜,並以大型語言模型標註與傳遞文件。

summary.en: AI-assisted clinical documentation for PT, OT, and SLP.
summary.zh: 為物理、職能與語言治療打造的 AI 輔助病歷。

highlight.en: Hippo Scribe listens, drafts clinical documentation in minutes, and syncs it to the EMR in seconds, letting therapists finish documentation 70% faster.
highlight.zh: Hippo Scribe 聆聽後在幾分鐘內草擬臨床病歷,並在數秒內同步至 EMR,讓治療師完成文件的速度快上 70%。

summary.en: Product design tool that lets everyone design like a designer.
summary.zh: 讓人人都能像設計師般設計的產品設計工具。

highlight.en: Built by founders whose first design-tools company was acquired by Airbnb, Noya lets non-designers like PMs, marketers, and engineers design screens and sites.
highlight.zh: 由首家設計工具公司被 Airbnb 收購的創辦人打造,Noya 讓產品經理、行銷與工程等非設計人員也能設計畫面與網站。

summary.en: Cloud-native, serverless stream processing via SQL.
summary.zh: 以 SQL 進行的雲原生無伺服器串流處理。

highlight.en: Arroyo lets companies transform, filter, and join Kafka streams in real time with SQL; it was acquired by Cloudflare in 2025 and now powers its Pipelines.
highlight.zh: Arroyo 讓企業僅用 SQL 即可即時轉換、過濾與合併 Kafka 串流;它於 2025 年被 Cloudflare 收購,現支撐 Cloudflare Pipelines。

summary.en: Zero-infrastructure background processing platform for Node.js.
summary.zh: 為 Node.js 打造的零基礎設施背景處理平台。

highlight.en: Defer gives Node.js developers a managed, Vercel-like platform for background jobs, CRONs, and workflows with an operational dashboard, set up in minutes.
highlight.zh: Defer 為 Node.js 開發者提供類似 Vercel 的代管平台,處理背景工作、CRON 與工作流程,附有營運儀表板,幾分鐘即可上手。

summary.en: Modern analytics platform for CPG brands.
summary.zh: 為消費包裝品品牌打造的現代分析平台。

highlight.en: Muffin Data combines proprietary datasets with automated ingestion to give CPG brands a unified view of in-store sales, distribution, and supply chain health.
highlight.zh: Muffin Data 結合專屬資料集與自動化匯入,為消費包裝品品牌提供店內銷售、產品鋪貨與供應鏈健康的統一視圖。

summary.en: AI search engine for academic research.
summary.zh: 學術研究的 AI 搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Epsilon answers research questions with citations drawn from the academic literature.
highlight.zh: Epsilon 以引自學術文獻的引用來回答研究問題。

summary.en: Open source tools and services for reliable AI agents and apps.
summary.zh: 打造可靠 AI 代理與應用的開源工具與服務。

highlight.en: DAGWorks standardizes how people express data, ML, LLM, and agent pipelines in Python with lightweight frameworks, adding observability in one line.
highlight.zh: DAGWorks 以輕量框架標準化人們用 Python 表達資料、機器學習、LLM 與代理管線的方式,只需一行即可加入可觀測性。

summary.en: Instant, fully automated SaaS management.
summary.zh: 即時且完全自動化的 SaaS 管理。

highlight.en: Sorted replaces spreadsheets and Slack surveys, giving admins visibility in two minutes for compliance audits, user provisioning, and tracking unused licenses.
highlight.zh: Sorted 取代試算表與 Slack 問卷,讓管理員在兩分鐘內掌握合規稽核、使用者佈建與閒置授權追蹤的全貌。

summary.en: AI agent for your personal finances, over iMessage.
summary.zh: 透過 iMessage 管理個人財務的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Maxi connects to your accounts and Gmail read-only and proactively texts you to cancel subscriptions, split expenses, send Venmo requests, and track net worth.
highlight.zh: Maxi 以唯讀權限連接你的帳戶與 Gmail,主動傳訊協助你取消訂閱、分攤費用、發送 Venmo 請款並追蹤淨資產。

summary.en: AI analysts for the buy-side.
summary.zh: 為買方提供的 AI 分析師。

highlight.en: Constant provides institutional-grade AI that replicates a team of top buy-side analysts.
highlight.zh: Constant 提供機構等級的 AI,重現一支頂尖買方分析師團隊。

summary.en: Single source of truth for a clinic's finances and supply chain.
summary.zh: 診所財務與供應鏈的單一可信來源。

highlight.en: Unstatiq unifies hospitals' disconnected supply chain and finance data into one product, tackling billions in waste from backorders, recalls, and split buying.
highlight.zh: Unstatiq 將醫院彼此脫節的供應鏈與財務資料整合為單一產品,解決缺貨、召回與分散採購所造成的數十億美元浪費。

summary.en: Programmable API gateway that makes APIs cacheable.
summary.zh: 讓 API 可被快取的可程式化 API 閘道。

highlight.en: SuperAPI makes critical fetch APIs cacheable to cut response times 10x, without spending months rewriting code.
highlight.zh: SuperAPI 讓關鍵的 fetch API 可被快取,將回應時間縮短 10 倍,且無需花數月重寫程式碼。

summary.en: Developer-first AI tool that converts designs to code.
summary.zh: 以開發者為先、將設計轉成程式碼的 AI 工具。

highlight.en: CodeParrot uses AI to convert components from Figma files or screenshots into production-ready code.
highlight.zh: CodeParrot 運用 AI 將 Figma 檔案或截圖中的元件轉換為可上線的程式碼。

summary.en: Interlock is a startup currently in stealth mode.
summary.zh: Interlock 是一家目前處於隱形模式的新創公司。

highlight.en: Interlock is a stealth-mode B2B company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: Interlock 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次、處於隱形模式的 B2B 公司。

summary.en: Automating nutrition tracking with an AI wearable camera.
summary.zh: 以 AI 穿戴式相機自動化營養追蹤。

highlight.en: Rex.Fit's DROP wearable camera uses computer vision to automate nutrition tracking; it drew $93k in preorders, and its estimation API already earns gyms money.
highlight.zh: Rex.Fit 的 DROP 穿戴式相機以電腦視覺自動化營養追蹤,已獲 9.3 萬美元預購,其估算 API 也已為健身房帶來經常性收入。

summary.en: AI that analyzes sales calls to improve rep performance.
summary.zh: 分析銷售通話以提升業務表現的 AI。

highlight.en: Fabius scores every call to flag deals that won't close and weak business cases, helping companies like Airbyte and Fermat stop reps wasting time on bad deals.
highlight.zh: Fabius 為每通通話評分,標出無法成交的案子與薄弱的商業理由,協助 Airbyte、Fermat 等公司避免業務在壞案子上浪費時間。

summary.en: The ultimate AI assistant for IP professionals.
summary.zh: 為智財專業人士打造的終極 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Edge uses AI to help IP professionals work — supporting trademark attorneys with clearance searches and patent attorneys with drafting patents.
highlight.zh: Edge 運用 AI 協助智財專業人士工作——支援商標律師進行檢索清查,並協助專利律師撰寫專利。

summary.en: Network intelligence for investors to source proprietary deals.
summary.zh: 協助投資人尋找獨家案源的人脈智慧平台。

highlight.en: Verata combines relationship intelligence with private company data to help PE firms find targets, spot warm paths, and reach companies before they go public.
highlight.zh: Verata 結合人脈關係智慧與私人公司資料,協助私募基金尋找標的、找出暖人脈路徑,並在公司進入市場前先接觸。

summary.en: Run AI pipelines 10x faster with hardware-accelerated APIs.
summary.zh: 以硬體加速 API 讓 AI 管線快上 10 倍。

highlight.en: Texel generates hardware-accelerated APIs that run image and video AI pipelines 10x faster on the latest NVIDIA GPUs or Google TPUs, without hardware expertise.
highlight.zh: Texel 讓開發者生成硬體加速 API,在最新 NVIDIA GPU 或 Google TPU 上以 10 倍速執行影像與影片 AI 管線,且無需具備硬體專業。

summary.en: ML that optimizes how grid batteries store energy.
summary.zh: 優化電網電池儲能方式的機器學習。

highlight.en: Atmeto redefines battery control algorithms to unlock gigawatts of untapped storage capacity, helping the grid run on more clean wind and solar power.
highlight.zh: Atmeto 重新設計電池控制演算法,釋放數十億瓦尚未開發的儲能容量,協助電網運用更多潔淨的風能與太陽能。

summary.en: Root cause manufacturing issues in seconds.
summary.zh: 於數秒內找出製造問題的根本原因。

highlight.en: Built by a team from Apple and Tesla, Serial integrates production-line data so engineering teams can ask questions and root cause issues in minutes, not days.
highlight.zh: 由具備 Apple 與 Tesla 經驗的團隊打造,Serial 整合產線資料,讓工程團隊能提問並在幾分鐘而非幾天內找出問題根因。

summary.en: Sales agents with 100+ data sources to close more deals.
summary.zh: 具備逾百種資料源的銷售代理,助你成交更多。

highlight.en: Persana consolidates a fragmented GTM stack into one agentic platform whose AI agents research, enrich, and engage prospects autonomously across 100+ sources.
highlight.zh: Persana 將碎片化的市場進入工具整合為單一代理平台,其 AI 代理跨逾百種資料源自主研究、補充並接觸潛在客戶。

summary.en: Magically simplify accounting and taxes.
summary.zh: 讓會計與稅務神奇地化繁為簡。

highlight.en: Finta offers automated bookkeeping, effortless tax filing, and real-time insights, set up in 10 minutes so founders can get back to building.
highlight.zh: Finta 提供自動化記帳、輕鬆報稅與即時洞察,10 分鐘即可設定,讓創辦人回頭專注打造產品。

summary.en: Open source build tool for monorepos and large codebases.
summary.zh: 為單一倉庫與大型程式碼庫打造的開源建置工具。

highlight.en: moonrepo's open source build system cuts build, test, and deploy times, paired with moonbase for cloud caching, CI insights, code ownership, and health metrics.
highlight.zh: moonrepo 的開源建置系統縮短建置、測試與部署時間,並搭配 moonbase 提供雲端快取、CI 洞察、程式碼歸屬與健康指標。

summary.en: coil inc. is an AI company.
summary.zh: coil inc. 是一家 AI 公司。

highlight.en: coil inc. is an AI company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: coil inc. 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次的 AI 公司。

summary.en: AI-accelerated procedural material and texture tools.
summary.zh: AI 加速的程序化材質與紋理工具。

highlight.en: Iliad's node-based material engine Aqueduct includes an AI assistant for building and editing procedural graphs, plus diffusion tools for texture and PBR maps.
highlight.zh: Iliad 的節點式材質引擎 Aqueduct 內建 AI 助理協助建立與編輯程序化圖譜,並提供生成紋理與 PBR 貼圖的擴散工具。

summary.en: Resolve PR check failures instantly with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 即時解決 PR 檢查失敗。

highlight.en: SensorSurf listens to check-run logs for failures and provides suggested changes you can instantly commit to your branch, getting pull requests merged faster.
highlight.zh: SensorSurf 監聽檢查執行日誌中的失敗,提供可立即提交至分支的修改建議,加速合併拉取請求。

summary.en: AI agents for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Lightski helps enterprises transform their operations with the latest AI agents.
highlight.zh: Lightski 運用最新的 AI 代理協助企業轉型其營運。

summary.en: AI that writes in your own human voice.
summary.zh: 以你個人語氣寫作的 AI。

highlight.en: Users feed in their own writing and Vaero trains a custom model to write exactly like them; it bolts onto any foundation model like GPT-4o or Claude Sonnet 3.5.
highlight.zh: 使用者輸入自己的文字,Vaero 即訓練客製模型以完全相同的風格寫作,並可掛接 GPT-4o 或 Claude Sonnet 3.5 等任何基礎模型。

summary.en: Laminate is an early-stage fintech startup.
summary.zh: Laminate 是一家早期金融科技新創公司。

highlight.en: Laminate is an early-stage fintech company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: Laminate 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次的早期金融科技公司。

summary.en: A blockchain where contracts can finally reason.
summary.zh: 讓合約終於能進行推理的區塊鏈。

highlight.en: KV Cash introduces intelligent contracts, combining deterministic AI with TypeScript to make on-chain logic simple, explainable, and composable.
highlight.zh: KV Cash 推出智慧合約,結合確定性 AI 與 TypeScript,使鏈上邏輯簡單、可解釋且可組合。

summary.en: Cloud warehousing and supply chain platform in MENA.
summary.zh: 中東北非的雲端倉儲與供應鏈平台。

highlight.en: Sirdab's end-to-end logistics platform lets businesses acquire dry, chilled, or frozen warehousing within 48 hours and manage and distribute inventory in-app.
highlight.zh: Sirdab 的端到端物流平台讓企業在 48 小時內取得乾貨、冷藏或冷凍倉儲空間,並於單一平台管理與配送庫存。

summary.en: Tagsafe is an early-stage B2B startup.
summary.zh: Tagsafe 是一家早期 B2B 新創公司。

highlight.en: Tagsafe is an early-stage B2B company from YC's Winter 2023 batch.
highlight.zh: Tagsafe 是出自 YC 2023 冬季梯次的早期 B2B 公司。
